# MellowKraft

MellowKraft is a custom ecommerce engineering company based in India.

We build high-converting web stores for small business owners and entrepreneurs — replacing platform-dependent stacks with fully owned infrastructure built to turn visitors into customers.

## What We Build
- Custom headless storefronts (conversion-focused, brand-owned)
- Order Management System (OMS)
- Inventory Management System (IMS)
- CRM and customer intelligence layer
- Marketing and analytics stack
- Data and automation layer

## Who We Serve
- D2C brands crossing ₹5 lakh+ monthly sales
- Fashion and lifestyle commerce teams in India
- Small business owners and entrepreneurs ready to convert visitors to customers and own their commerce stack

## Why Brands Choose MellowKraft
- No platform success tax (revenue-linked fees)
- Full data ownership and portability
- Systems architected to scale — not patched with apps
- 4–6 week delivery window
